body_txt: It's not unusual to see a same-sex couple with a child. In the real world this happens through adoption, in-vitro fertilization, or children of a prior relationship viewing the other same-sex partner as a stepparent even if they're not (or cannot be) legally married, but what about the child who is conceived from two genetic parents of the same sex? Assuming there's no pre-op note or more precisely, without bottom surgery transgender people involved, this trope turns a blind eye to the exact method of birth ( People Jars , womb , etc.) and sticks to naming any kid who draws their genetic heritage from two individuals of the same sex, regardless of how they were incubated/born, and whether this was the result of magic , genderbending , shapeshifting , DNA splicing , or bizarre alien / human biology . This trope is particularly common in fanfiction; the male version is often called "mpreg" (short for " male pregnancy ") note the term covers male pregnancies in general, not being limited to those arising from male/male relationships and the female version is sometimes called "fempreg"/"fpreg". Compare Truly Single Parent and Extra Parent Conception . Contrast Face Full of Alien Wing-Wong . Can result in Mister Seahorse (even though Pregnancy Does Not Work That Way ). Often a necessity in a One-Gender Race . Not to be confused with Your Tomcat Is Pregnant . See also Shapeshifter's Offspring . A Hypothetical Offspring Comparison often involves this as a joke.
